creator: asmodai@wxs.nl
text:
On 07-Feb-99 daleg@preferred.com wrote:

libkrb is Kerberos. The question now arises did you include Kerberos
support on yer machine?

This thing has been discussed a lot on the current mailinglist and IIRC it
involves installing either Athena or true Kerberos IV. Ye might thus also
want to try to search the mailinglist or ask on the other mailinglists such
as stable or current before sending a pr.
